title: When Status changes on a board, move an item to another group on another board
excerpt: I want to be able to set up an automation saying that “When Status changes on a board, move an item to another group on another board”.

posts.author: Mie (Mie Andie Simonsen)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to be able to set up an automation saying that “When Status changes on a board, move an item to another group on another board”.
